title: [FIRRTL] Non-local Instance Port Annotations Fail to Parse/Scatter

features.name: FIRRTL non-local annotation targeting instance port
features.description: Code should include a non-local annotation (NLA) targeting an instance port using hierarchical path with '>' separator
features.snippet:
circuit Foo: %[[
  {"class":"hello","target":"~Foo|Foo/bar:Bar>baz.a"}
]]
  module Baz:
    output a: UInt<1>
    a is invalid
  module Bar:
    inst baz of Baz
  module Foo:
    inst bar of Bar

features.name: FIRRTL instance inst creation with hierarchical reference
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL module instantiation with a named instance that becomes a hierarchical reference target
features.snippet:
module Bar:
    inst baz of Baz
  module Foo:
    inst bar of Bar
